items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Stacked disclosure rows with measured panel animation.

items.name: action-bar
items.title: ActionBar
items.description: Reusable hover actions for message and response controls.

items.name: activity
items.title: Activity
items.description: Shared static and collapsible activity anatomy with bounded, scrollable detail content.

items.name: agent-team-view
items.title: AgentTeamView
items.description: Spatial team management composed on Infinite Canvas with draggable 3D team blocks and selected-team details.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Inline status panel for callouts, errors, and notices.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert dialog
items.description: Modal confirmation dialog for destructive or blocking decisions.

items.name: all
items.title: All Control UI components
items.description: Alias for the complete Control UI component set with the Refined skin.

items.name: all-cuicui
items.title: All Control UI components — Cuicui
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Cuicui skin.

items.name: all-flat
items.title: All Control UI components — Flat
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Flat skin.

items.name: all-linear
items.title: All Control UI components — Linear
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Linear skin.

items.name: all-liquid-metal
items.title: All Control UI components — Liquid metal
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Liquid metal skin.

items.name: all-modern-apple
items.title: All Control UI components — Modern Apple
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Modern Apple skin.

items.name: all-refined
items.title: All Control UI components — Refined
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Refined skin.

items.name: all-rig
items.title: All Control UI components — Rig
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Rig skin.

items.name: all-xp
items.title: All Control UI components — Windows XP
items.description: Every Control UI agent component, block, and primitive with the Windows XP skin.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect ratio
items.description: CSS aspect-ratio wrapper for media and previews.

items.name: audio-recorder
items.title: AudioRecorder
items.description: Voice recorder with realtime waveform, duration, cancel, and submit controls.

items.name: audio-visualizer
items.title: AudioVisualizer
items.description: Levels-driven realtime audio visualizer offered in two usage versions - bars and line - sharing one export and one props contract.

items.name: audio-visualizer-line
items.title: AudioVisualizer — line
items.description: Line rendering of the shared realtime audio visualizer contract.

items.name: autocomplete
items.title: Autocomplete
items.description: Free-text input with search-as-you-type suggestions.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Profile image with initials fallback and composable overlapping groups.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Compact status, label, or count chip.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Accessible action button with size, variant, and semantic tone support.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button group
items.description: Joined button group for toolbars, split actions, and segmented controls.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Date selection grid built on react-day-picker and themed through tokens.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Content surface for panels, tiles, and settings groups.

items.name: chat
items.title: Chat agents
items.description: Runtime-agnostic chat components installed as a complete agent surface.

items.name: chat-block
items.title: Chat
items.description: Controlled chat shell that composes rendered turns and a provider-owned composer.

items.name: chat-composer
items.title: ChatComposer
items.description: Prompt composer with controlled text, submit state, and trigger-menu support.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/chat-composer-editor.css";

items.name: chat-composer-attachment
items.title: ChatComposerAttachment
items.description: Composer attachment rail with file previews, upload progress, and removal.

items.name: chat-layout
items.title: ChatLayout
items.description: Layout primitives for full chat threads, turns, and thoughts.

items.name: chat-message
items.title: ChatMessage
items.description: Composable chat message with typed role, density, and tone state.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Single checkbox control with checked and indeterminate states.

items.name: checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox Group
items.description: Multi-select checkbox set with shared state and select-all support.

items.name: code
items.title: Code
items.description: Shared code surface: Shiki-highlighted lines, gutter, clean copy, and virtualization for large files.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/code.css";

items.name: code-block-editor
items.title: CodeBlockEditor
items.description: Editable code surface with Shiki highlighting and token-based light/dark themes.

items.name: code-diff
items.title: Code Diff
items.description: Unified or split diff from a git patch or a before/after pair, with word-level intra-line highlighting.

items.name: coding-agent-block
items.title: Coding agent
items.description: Desktop coding workspace with project tasks, a focused conversation, and a persistent controlled composer.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Accessible disclosure primitive with measured open and close motion.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: Color input with picker UI, formats, presets, and contrast helpers.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Searchable single-select with input and floating option list.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Command palette with token-matched dialog, input, and result rows.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Pointer-positioned right-click and long-press menu with nested actions and selection controls.

items.name: control-effects
items.title: ControlEffects
items.description: CSS-driven control effects (top-shine, ripple, hover-circle) that follow every control app-wide through the emitted anatomy — portalled surfaces included.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog for focused tasks, confirmations, and custom panels.

items.name: dockable-panel
items.title: Dockable Panel
items.description: Non-modal workspace panel that moves between two explicit edge slots with a mobile Drawer fallback.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Swipeable edge panel for mobile sheets and off-canvas surfaces.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: DropdownMenu
items.description: Dropdown menu for actions, resources, labels, separators, and submenus.

items.name: dropzone
items.title: Dropzone
items.description: Composable file intake with validation, managed selection, and drag-activated overlays.

items.name: dynamic-notification
items.title: DynamicNotification
items.description: Dynamic Island-style AI notification pill with a thinking state that morphs into a reply bubble — token-driven surface, WebGL-enhanced backdrop blur, or real refractive liquid glass.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/dynamic-notification.css";

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: Empty-state layout for blank lists, zero results, and new workspaces.

items.name: environment-variables
items.title: EnvironmentVariables
items.description: Composable environment variable editor with .env upload, bulk paste, reveal controls, and submit helpers.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Form field wrapper for labels, descriptions, errors, and validity state.

items.name: file-explorer-block
items.title: File explorer
items.description: Finder-inspired file browser with locations, search, resizable columns, breadcrumbs, and an item preview.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Form wrapper that coordinates field validation and returned errors.

items.name: gradient-editor
items.title: Gradient Editor
items.description: CSS gradient editor with draggable stops and live preview.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover card
items.description: Hover or focus preview panel for profiles, links, and contextual details.

items.name: infinite-canvas
items.title: Infinite Canvas
items.description: Pan-and-zoom spatial workspace for arranging content without fixed bounds.

items.name: inline-attachment
items.title: InlineAttachment
items.description: Inline file and media previews for chat turns.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text field primitive sized and styled to match other controls.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input group
items.description: Joined input wrapper for addons, icons, and focus-within rings.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: One-time-code field with grouped, focus-aware slots.

items.name: item
items.title: Item
items.description: List row with media, content, and trailing actions.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut chip and chord group.

items.name: markdown
items.title: Markdown
items.description: Rendered agent markdown (GFM) whose code fences compose Code, and diff fences compose CodeDiff.

items.name: markdown-block
items.title: MarkdownBlock
items.description: Assistant markdown output rendered to prose, with a header and copy-source action.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Desktop command bar with nested menus, shortcuts, and separators.

items.name: meter
items.title: Meter
items.description: Static range meter for quota, storage, score, or usage values.

items.name: morphing-panel
items.title: Morphing Panel
items.description: Accessible disclosure surface that morphs between explicit collapsed and expanded dimensions.

items.name: native-select
items.title: Native select
items.description: Native select control styled to match the Control UI control family.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation menu
items.description: Site navigation menu with a shared animated viewport.

items.name: next-app
items.title: Control UI Next.js app
items.description: Minimal Next.js starter wiring for the complete Control UI registry.

items.name: number-field
items.title: Number Field
items.description: Numeric input with stepper buttons and optional drag-to-change behavior.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation for long lists and result sets.

items.name: phone-input
items.title: Phone input
items.description: International phone field with country search, E.164 values, and Zod validation helpers.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Anchored floating panel for inline settings and contextual content.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Determinate task progress with optional label and value rows.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio group
items.description: Single-choice radio set for plans, filters, and option lists.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Accessible resizable panel groups and split layouts with keyboard support.

items.name: responsive-dialog
items.title: Responsive dialog
items.description: Modal dialog on desktop that becomes a swipeable bottom drawer on mobile.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll area
items.description: Scroll container with overlay scrollbars and edge fades.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Single-choice picker with a token-matched trigger and floating list.

items.name: send-aurora
items.title: SendAurora
items.description: Anchored ChatComposer extension: a blurred aurora backdrop that sweeps up once per sent message — activated from skin.config via the chat-composer:send-layer anchor.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/send-aurora.css";

items.name: settings-block
items.title: Settings
items.description: Searchable multi-page settings shell with responsive navigation and accessible control groups.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Responsive app sidebar with collapse, mobile sheet, and keyboard toggle support.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder with a token-driven shimmer.

items.name: skin-cuicui
items.title: Cuicui skin
items.description: Cuicui-inspired shell skin with fixed grain, a docked w-80 sidebar, a neutral main container, and the send-aurora anchored extension on ChatComposer (skin.config fills the chat-composer:send-layer anchor).
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: skin-flat
items.title: Flat skin
items.description: Neutral reset skin with square corners, no shadows, and instant motion.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: skin-linear
items.title: Linear skin
items.description: Linear-inspired skin: indigo brand on a cool neutral ramp, a flat 13px chrome band, 4px radius, hairline borders instead of elevation, and pill-shaped filled actions.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: skin-liquid-metal
items.title: Liquid metal skin
items.description: Polished metal skin with a WebGL shader control surface.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: skin-modern-apple
items.title: Modern Apple skin
items.description: Apple-inspired Liquid Glass skin: WebGL-refraction on floating surfaces, precise directional rims, transparent inputs, and continuous corners.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css"; Then mount ModernAppleLiquidGlassRuntime once near the app root from @/components/control-ui/modern-apple-liquid-glass-runtime. The runtime uses createImageBitmap when available; if an older browser needs its image-decoder fallback, allow data: in img-src or it will retain the CSS glass fallback.

items.name: skin-refined
items.title: Refined skin
items.description: Compact, calm starting skin with a complete Control UI token contract.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: skin-rig
items.title: Rig skin
items.description: Brutalist skin with coral accents, squared corners, and dense typography.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: skin-xp
items.title: Windows XP skin
items.description: Windows XP-inspired Luna tokens, bevels, and titlebar details.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Single-value range control with branded and plain treatments.

items.name: source-badge
items.title: SourceBadge
items.description: Linked source badge with an automatic same-origin favicon, derived hostname, and resilient fallback.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Accessible loading indicator for pending buttons, panels, and inline waits.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: Static and interactive workflow steps with horizontal and vertical layouts.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: On/off control with token-driven track, thumb, and press motion.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Responsive data table for lists, comparisons, and structured records.

items.name: table-of-contents
items.title: Table of contents
items.description: Sticky in-page navigation with scroll-spy range highlighting.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Segmented and browser-style navigation with a stable active indicator.

items.name: task-list
items.title: TaskList
items.description: Floating agent task progress pill above the composer that expands into the full task list.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multiline text field with CSS-first auto-growth.

items.name: theme-toggle-block
items.title: Theme toggle
items.description: Controlled theme controls with a three-value switch, binary switch, cycle button, and dropdown.

items.name: thread-rail
items.title: ThreadRail
items.description: Conversation minimap for scanning and jumping between chat turns.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/thread-rail.css";

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: Transient notifications with a callable toast API and single Toaster mount.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Pressed-state button and toggle group built on the Button surface.

items.name: toolbar
items.title: Toolbar
items.description: Roving-focus toolbar for editor controls and compact actions.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover or focus hint popup with Base UI positioning and Control UI tokens.

items.name: tree
items.title: Tree
items.description: Accessible tree view with roving keyboard navigation, single/multi selection, and animated disclosure.

items.name: trigger-menu
items.title: Trigger Menu
items.description: Caret-anchored command or mention menu for text editors.

items.name: typography
items.title: Typography
items.description: The token-driven type scale — one --text-* rung per size, named by role. Publish the utilities, not a component.
items.docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/type-scale.css";

items.name: user-ask
items.title: UserAsk
items.description: Keyboard-first agent question panel that temporarily replaces the chat composer inside its container.

items.name: view-transition
items.title: viewTransition
items.description: Interrupt-safe driver for the browser View Transitions API: deferred finish, fast-click interruption, reduced-motion fallback.
